topic: stop parsing prose — make the LLM return strict JSON

beats.concept: a messy free-text prose blob slams a brittle parser, fracturing it with red error sparks while a status light flips to ERROR and a retry counter climbs
techniques: wobbling free-text prose-blob (sin-perturbed closed-path outline leaking unstructured words)
brittle parser-plate fracture (deterministic jagged crack paths spreading + widening with impact)
red error-spark burst per blob-slam (radial sin-hash ejecta with decay)
parser-status-light flip to ERROR (blinking red pip + SyntaxError readout)
retry-loop counter climb on repeated parse failure
decaying impact screen-shake on the spoken break word

beats.concept: a rigid schema die-stamp descends and presses the output through key-cavities; clean aligned JSON key:value fields snap into pre-cut slots and a schema-lock seal sets
techniques: descending schema die-stamp press with contact-squash flash
key-cavity cut-outs in the die underside (only fitting values pass)
field-into-slot snap with per-field spring overshoot (sequential cascade)
dashed pre-cut output slot bed the fields lock into
schema-lock padlock seal that sets once all fields snapped

beats.concept: rows of responses flip red ERROR to green VALID in a cascade, a parse-success ring fills to 100%, the big status light hard-flips to VALID, and the retry odometer counts down to a zero-snap
techniques: per-row status-pip flip cascade (red ERROR to green VALID, staggered)
parse-success fill ring climbing to 100% (strokeDasharray arc)
big parser-status-light hard flip ERROR to VALID
retry-loop odometer count-DOWN with a zero-snap on the spoken word
